headline: Barclays Raises its Price Target on F5 (FFIV)
summary: F5, Inc. (NASDAQ:FFIV) is one of the 10 Best Debt-Free S&P 500 Stocks to Buy Now. On May 26, 2026, Barclays raised the firm’s price target on F5, Inc. (NASDAQ:FFIV) to $435 from $365 and maintained an Overweight rating on the shares ahead of the company’s investor day on May 28. Barclays said the underlying […]
